Seattle & Puget Sound Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

18 senior living communities in the Seattle & Puget Sound region of Washington, organized by city.

How Washington regulates senior care

Assisted living facilities and Adult Family Homes are licensed by DSHS; Washington has one of the largest small-home (Adult Family Home) sectors in the country. License & inspection lookup: Washington DSHS Aging and Long-Term Support Administration.

New to this?

Start with how to choose a facility, levels of care, and the touring checklist.

Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Last data review: 2026-07-11.
